title: Indebtedness and Related Feelings of Shame 2019-2020
description: The dataset consists of texts written on Finnish experiences of and feelings related to indebtedness. The invitation to write prompted the participants to discuss, among other topics, how they had become indebted, how the feeling of shame was connected to the reasons why they were indebted, and in which situations they had experienced shame. Additionally, the participants were asked to write about the help they had sought for indebtedness and to describe their current situation. Main themes in t
